description: Hispanic American street gang based in the San Fernando Valley, Los Angeles, founded in January 1988 by former 18th Street gang members. The gang has approximately 300 members and is part of the Sureño coalition. It has alliances with Armenian Power and the Abergil crime family, and ties to the Sinaloa Cartel. The gang was involved in the 2003 murder of Burbank Police Officer Matthew Pavelka, leading to a large-scale crackdown.

country_links.evidence_quote: revealing the Vineland Boys' ties to the Sinaloa Cartel , Mexico 's largest drug cartel
country_links.context: The Vineland Boys have ties to the Sinaloa Cartel, a Mexican drug cartel, indicating a supply or alliance link.
